opinion.h4: SCHON v. SCHON, EXECUTOR. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF FLORIDA. No. 33, Misc. Decided October 13, 1958.
opinion.p: The motion to add the State of Florida as a party appellee is denied. The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
